DOC_ENABLED: Enable or disable the Curated Radio plugin globally.
DOC_DATABASE_PATH: SQLite database file used to store stations and status. Maximum 512 characters.
DOC_SEED_JSON_PATH: Path to your base station JSON file imported during sync. Maximum 512 characters.
DOC_FINDINGS_JSON_PATH: Path to discovery findings JSON used for new candidates. Maximum 512 characters.
DOC_AUTO_REFRESH: Automatically verify existing stream URLs on the schedule.
DOC_AUTO_DISCOVER: Automatically search for new curated stations on the schedule.
DOC_REFRESH_INTERVAL_MINUTES: Range 60-10080 minutes. Recommended 4320 (every 3 days) to keep discovery/refresh bounded.
DOC_DISCOVERY_API_BASE: Radio Browser API base URL used for discovery requests (http/https, max 256 chars).
DOC_DISCOVERY_LIMIT: Range 10-120. Recommended 30 candidates per discovery run for quality with controlled runtime.
DOC_DISCOVERY_PROFILE_PROMPT: Multiline allowed. Maximum 2400 characters. Recommended: clear prefer/avoid/sources sections.
DOC_EDITORIAL_SOURCE_URLS: Multiline or comma-separated. Maximum 30 sources, each source max 240 characters.
DOC_CURATED_TAG_SEEDS: Multiline or comma-separated. Maximum 120 tags, each tag max 80 characters.
DOC_BLOCKED_TAG_PATTERNS: Multiline or comma-separated. Maximum 120 patterns, each pattern max 80 characters.
DOC_BLOCKED_NAME_PATTERNS: Multiline or comma-separated. Maximum 120 patterns, each pattern max 80 characters.
DOC_DISCOVERY_CLOUD_TERM_LIMIT: Range 10-80. Recommended 40 term-cloud keywords for broad but stable discovery.
DOC_DISCOVERY_AI_ENABLED: Use AI to propose additional search terms for discovery.
DOC_DISCOVERY_AI_API_BASE: Base URL for the AI API endpoint (http/https, max 256 chars).
DOC_DISCOVERY_AI_MODEL: Model name used for AI-assisted term expansion (max 80 characters).
DOC_DISCOVERY_AI_API_KEY: Enter a new API key and save (masked in UI). Leave empty to keep current key.
DOC_DISCOVERY_AI_API_KEY_STATUS: Shows whether a key is available from plugin config or OPENAI_API_KEY environment.
DOC_DISCOVERY_AI_TERM_LIMIT: Range 0-12. Recommended 4 AI-suggested terms per run to limit API cost and runtime.
DOC_LAST_SYNC_SUMMARY: Summary of the most recent sync/discovery/refresh results.
DOC_LAST_CRAWLED_AT: Timestamp of the last discovery crawl run.
DOC_LAST_CHECKED_AT: Timestamp of the last stream health check run.
ROOT_DESCRIPTION: Curated radio lists backed by a local database
CURRENT_STATION_SAVED: Current station saved to Interesting Stations
CURRENT_STATION_REMOVED: Current station removed from Interesting Stations
